metadata.description: Context-engineering plugins for GitHub Copilot, APM, and Claude Code: retrieval modalities and a routing agent, local RAG, Obsidian, plan-big/execute-small delegation, context steering, read-only verification, and portable plugin authoring.

plugins.name: retrieval-core
plugins.description: The spine: a retrieval-strategist agent and retrieval-strategy skill that pick and compose search modalities.

plugins.name: code-search
plugins.description: Fast CLI search across modalities: lexical, structural, code-intelligence, structured-data, history, rewrite, metrics, and docs.

plugins.name: local-rag
plugins.description: Fully-local semantic RAG: chunk, embed via ollama, index with turbovec; a bin/rag CLI with hybrid retrieval.

plugins.name: obsidian
plugins.description: Skill-only RAG bridge: turn an Obsidian vault's graph and tags into a candidate set fed to local-rag.

plugins.name: plan-execute
plugins.description: Plan-big / execute-small orchestration: a strong model plans and delegates token-heavy work to cheaper subagents.

plugins.name: context-steering
plugins.description: Choose where guidance lives — always-on memory, path-scoped rules, on-demand skills, subagents, MCP servers, or deterministic hooks — to steer agents while keeping the always-on context budget small.

plugins.name: verify
plugins.description: Read-only verification: a verifier subagent and verify-before-trust skill check claims against the actual codebase and emit per-claim verdicts with file:line evidence.

plugins.name: plugin-forge
plugins.description: Author portable GitHub Copilot / APM / Claude Code plugins and keep plugin.json and apm.yml in sync: a conventions skill, a /scaffold-plugin command, and a manifest-drift validator.
